common.siteDescription: Find a therapist and book a consultation session with Google Meet.

home.title: Help
home.subtitle: Find a therapist. Book a session. Start your journey.

about.title: About Us
about.missionText: We believe everyone deserves access to quality mental health support. Our platform connects you with experienced therapists who can help you navigate life's challenges in a safe, confidential environment.
about.howText: Browse our therapists, find someone who matches your needs, and book a consultation session online. Sessions are conducted via Google Meet, so you can connect from the comfort of your home.
about.approachText: Every person is unique, and so is their path to wellbeing. Our therapists use evidence-based approaches tailored to your individual needs and goals.

therapists.title: Our Therapists
therapists.subtitle: Find the right therapist for you. Each of our professionals brings unique expertise and a compassionate approach to care.

booking.title: Book a Session
booking.description: Choose a time that works for you with {therapistName}. You will receive a Google Calendar invite with a Google Meet link for your session.
booking.placeholder: Cal.com scheduling widget will be embedded here

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Insights, tips, and resources for your mental health journey.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services, booking process, and what to expect.

booking.question: How do I book a session?
booking.answer: Browse our therapists, select one that fits your needs, and click 'Book a Session'. You will see available time slots and can choose one that works for you. Both you and the therapist will receive a Google Calendar invite with a Google Meet link.

cost.question: How much does a session cost?
cost.answer: Session fees vary by therapist. You can find pricing information on each therapist's profile page. We recommend discussing fees during your first consultation.

insurance.question: Do you accept insurance?
insurance.answer: Insurance coverage varies by provider and plan. We recommend contacting your insurance company to check if online therapy sessions are covered under your plan.

duration.question: How long is a session?
duration.answer: A standard therapy session is 50 minutes. Some therapists may offer longer sessions — check their profile for details.

cancellation.question: What if I need to cancel or reschedule?
cancellation.answer: You can cancel or reschedule your session up to 24 hours before the appointment time. Cancellations with less than 24 hours notice may be subject to a cancellation fee.

effectiveness.question: Is online therapy as effective as in-person therapy?
effectiveness.answer: Research consistently shows that online therapy can be just as effective as in-person therapy for many conditions, including anxiety, depression, and stress. The convenience of online sessions can also improve consistency and engagement.

technology.question: What technology do I need?
technology.answer: You need a stable internet connection and a device with a camera and microphone (computer, tablet, or smartphone). Sessions are conducted via Google Meet — no special software is required.

impressum.disclaimerText: The contents of this website have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under general law. However, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.overviewText: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR/DSGVO) and this privacy policy.
datenschutz.collectionText: When you use this website, various personal data may be collected. This includes data you provide when filling out the contact form (name, email address, message content). Some data is collected automatically by our IT systems when you visit the website, such as your browser type, operating system, and the time of access.
datenschutz.cookiesText: This website uses cookies that are necessary for its technical operation. These include a cookie to store your language preference. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.
datenschutz.thirdPartyText: This website uses Cal.com for appointment scheduling. When you use the booking feature, your data will be processed by Cal.com in accordance with their privacy policy. Sessions are conducted via Google Meet, which is subject to Google's privacy policy.
datenschutz.rightsText: You have the right to request information about your stored personal data, its origin, recipients, and the purpose of data processing at any time and free of charge. You also have the right to request the correction or deletion of this data. You can revoke consent to data processing at any time. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.
datenschutz.contactText: For questions regarding data protection, please contact us at: [your-email@example.com]

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question or need more information? Send us a message and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.success: Thank you for your message! We will get back to you shortly.
